name: iter_0001_island1_layers2
reasoning_summary: iter_0001 batch, island 1: num_layers 1 -> 2 (depth test, keep h=64). All 5 children are bigru variants (only runnable family pre-entry-points). Single-axis perturbations explore the BiGRU hyperparam neighborhood in parallel; we learn 5 things per batch instead of 1.
